backstory.original: Krond was born of a union between an academic human wizard and a mighty orc fighter who led a nomadic orc community. Raised as a fearsome warrior and arcane scholar, he studied these arts with equal passion. Krond's parents tragically lost their lives protecting their family and friends during an enemy raid. This moment changed Krond, and he swore revenge upon the world. Taking up an ancestral warhammer called Unity, Krond set out to make things right, one way or another.
backstory.display: 克朗的母亲是一位学识渊博的人类法师，父亲则是一位曾统领游牧兽人部落的强悍兽人战士。自幼，他便被当作一名令人胆寒的战士与精通奥术的学者来培养，对战斗技艺与奥术学问抱有同等的热忱。在一次敌人的突袭中，他的父母为了保护家人和朋友不幸丧生。这一悲惨瞬间彻底改变了他的人生轨迹，他发誓要向这个世界复仇。随后，他拿起一把名为“团结”的祖传战锤，决心用尽一切办法，向世界讨回一个公道。

description.original: Krond leaps out and attacks the front-most target with his bonded warhammer. If you have a Cantrip Feat equipped, he then casts the given Cantrip.
description.display: 克朗跳起并用他的战锤攻击最前方的目标。如果装备了戏法专长，他随后会施展该戏法。

description.original: Krond teleports to a random enemy and causes massive area damage.
description.display: 克朗传送到一个随机敌人处，并造成大量范围伤害。

longDescription.original: Krond throws down his warhammer and leaps up into the air, teleporting to a random enemy and causing massive area damage by slamming down to the ground and casting Shatter when he appears.
longDescription.display: 克朗扔下他的战锤并跃入空中，传送到一个随机敌人处，猛地砸向地面并在出现时施展“粉碎”技能，造成大量范围伤害。

description.desc: Krond can equip a single Cantrip Feat at a time, adding that spell to his base attack. Krond's Cantrips are Fire Bolt, Shocking Grasp, and Thunderclap, with each getting stronger Feat versions at Rare and eventually Epic. When you acquire the stronger versions of the Feats, they will replace the lower-level versions.
克朗一次只能装备一个戏法专长，并将该法术加入他的基本攻击中。克朗的可用戏法包括：火焰箭、电爪术和雷鸣术，每个都有非凡品质和最终史诗品质的强化专长版本。当你获得更强版本的专长时，它将替代低等级版本。

conditions.desc: Krond increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Krond increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位善良阵营的勇士，克朗就提高所有勇士的伤害 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每有一位邪恶阵营的勇士，克朗就提高所有勇士的伤害 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Krond increases the damage of all Champions based on the number of Evil Champions. A specialization expands this to include those with high Strength, Constitution, or Intelligence.
tipText.display: 克朗根据阵型中邪恶勇士的数量来提升所有勇士的伤害。如果学习某项专精，可将此效果扩展到包括那些拥有高力量、体质或智力的勇士。

description.desc: Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a STR score of 16 or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位力量值高于或等于 16 的勇士，克朗使无名联盟的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Krond's brute force is amplified when allied with warriors of unparalleled might.
specializationDescription.display: 当克朗与无比强大的战士结盟时，他的蛮力会得到增强。

description.desc: Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a CON score of 16 or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位体质高于或等于 16 的勇士，克朗使无名联盟的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Krond thrives when his allies are forged in the crucible of hardship and pain.
specializationDescription.display: 当克朗的盟友在艰难困苦的熔炉中锤炼出来时，他便能蓬勃发展。

description.desc: Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with an INT score of 16 or higher, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位智力高于或等于 16 的勇士，克朗使无名联盟的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: In the company of strategic allies, Krond's keen intellect transforms chaos into calculated triumph.
specializationDescription.display: 在富有谋略的盟友陪伴下，克朗敏锐的智慧能将混乱转化为精心谋划的胜利。

conditions.desc: Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $(not_buffed amount)% for each point of STR over 16 on every Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $(not_buffed amount)% for each point of CON over 16 on every Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $(not_buffed amount)% for each point of INT over 16 on every Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每位勇士的力量每高于 16 一点，克朗即提高“无名联盟”的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每位勇士的体质每高于 16 一点，克朗即提高“无名联盟”的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
阵型中每位勇士的智力每高于 16 一点，克朗即提高“无名联盟”的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Krond further increases his damage bonus based on how high his companions' chosen ability scores are - higher scores provide greater boosts.
tipText.display: 克朗会根据他同伴所选技能值的高低进一步提升他的伤害加成——技能值越高，加成越大。

description.desc: Krond gains the Debuff role and enemies damaged by Krond take an additional $amount% damage from all of his subsequent attacks, including any Cantrip spells.
克朗获得“减益”角色定位。被克伦德造成伤害的敌人后续遭到克伦德攻击（包括任何戏法法术）时，会额外受到 $amount% 的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Krond's arcane skill weakens his foes, making every subsequent blow cut deeper.
specializationDescription.display: 克朗的奥术技能会削弱敌人，使后续的每一次攻击都更加致命。

description.desc: Krond increases the effect of Unsung Alliance by $amount% when he is not the formation's BUD-setting Champion.
如果克朗不是阵型的基础杀招伤害设置勇士，克朗即提高“无名联盟”的效果 $amount%，以乘算方式叠加。

specializationDescription.original: Krond guides the party from the shadows, empowering his allies to deal more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 克朗在暗中引导队伍，赋予盟友更强的伤害输出能力。

description.desc: Krond's Cantrip Feats now deal damage equal to $amount seconds of BUD-based damage for each $increase_threshold% of Krond's base damage that they normally deal.
克朗德的神通特长现在会造成伤害，相当于克朗德的基础伤害每增加 $阈值%，就会造成 $秒的基于 BUD 的伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Krond's deadly magic transforms his simple cantrips into explosive magical attacks.
specializationDescription.display: 克朗致命的魔法能将他简单的戏法转化为具有爆炸性的魔法攻击。

description.original: Sometimes two halves make more than a whole.
description.display: 有的时候，三个臭皮匠，胜过诸葛亮。

description.original: My might and magic will destroy you.
description.display: 我的力量和魔法将摧毁你。

description.original: Striking, isn't it?
description.display: 很震撼，不是吗？

description.original: My mother would appreciate this about me.
description.display: 我的母亲会喜欢我这一点。

description.original: The goblins that killed my mother shall not live long!
description.display: 杀害我母亲的地精，绝对活不长！

description.original: Watch over me, mother and father. I shall lead them as you would have done.
description.display: 父母啊，请守护着我。我会像你们那样带领他们前行。

description.original: A vrock demon's stunning screech is a vile cacophony you never forget. I shall demonstrate.
description.display: 弗洛魔那令人震惊的可怖尖叫令你永远无法遗忘。我来给你演示一下。

effects.description: Krond's base attack deals $amount% of its damage as area damage to all nearby enemies.

description.original: I was inspired to study how a dao genie's magic can burst apart the very earth.
description.display: 我受到启发，研究了道魔精灵的魔法如何能炸开大地。

effects.description: Krond's base attack deals $amount% of its damage as area damage to all nearby enemies.

description.original: I survived the thunderous bellow of the legendary tarrasque. Now I wield that ruin for my own.
description.display: 我从传说中泰拉斯奎巨兽那雷鸣般的咆哮中幸存下来。现在我将那毁灭之力为己所用。

effects.description: Krond's base attack deals $amount% of its damage as area damage to all nearby enemies.

description.original: The charged tendrils of shambling mounds were worth the danger for my studies.
description.display: 那些蔓生怪长着带电的触须，为了我的研究，冒这个险也值得。

effects.description: Krond gains the Control role and his base attack deals additional $amount% damage to the main target, and the target is stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

description.original: I trained with storm giants in a castle above the clouds to learn the secrets of their mighty thunderbolts.
description.display: 我在云层之上的城堡中与风暴巨人一起训练，学习他们强大的雷电奥秘。

effects.description: Krond gains the Control role and his base attack deals additional $amount% damage to the main target, and the target is stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

description.original: Few can survive the lightning strike of a rampaging kraken. I did. Let's see how you fare.
description.display: 很少有人能在横冲直撞的海怪的闪电攻击下幸存。我做到了。来看看你能撑多久。

effects.description: Krond gains the Control role and his base attack deals additional $amount% damage to the main target, and the target is stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

description.original: Flameskulls make for poor teachers. I learned what I could before smashing it to pieces.
description.display: 燃焰之颅可不是什么好老师。我在把它砸成碎片之前尽可能地学了一招。

effects.description: Krond's base attacks shoot out $num_projectiles fire bolts, each dealing $amount% of its base damage to up to three other random enemies.

description.original: I sparred for a tenday with a salamander inferno master. Let me show you what I learned.
description.display: 我与一名火蜥蜴炼狱大师切磋了十天。给你展示一下我学到的东西吧。

effects.description: Krond's base attacks shoot out $num_projectiles fire bolts, each dealing $amount% of its base damage to up to four other random enemies.

description.original: An ancient red dragon was among my finest masters. I slew her and took her flame for my own.
description.display: 一位古老的红龙曾是我最出色的导师之一。我杀了她，并将她的火焰据为己有。

effects.description: Krond's base attacks shoot out $num_projectiles fire bolts, each dealing $amount% of its base damage to up to five other random enemies.

description.original: They say great minds think alike. I think of revenge. What of you?
description.display: 人们说英雄所见略同。我想的是复仇，你们呢？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Krond's Unsung Alliance ability by $amount%

description.original: You all have proven yourselves worthy of my respect.
description.display: 你们都已证明自己值得我尊重。

description.original: Together, we will crush ANY opposition!
description.display: 齐心协力，我们将击溃一切阻碍！

description.original: Too long have I been forgotten!
description.display: 我已经被遗忘得太久了！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Krond's first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Strength and guile will see us through this.
description.display: 力量和诡计会帮我们渡过难关。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Krond's first set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: My parents taught me much, but above all is this: one needs allies to survive in this world.
description.display: 我的父母教会了我很多东西，但最重要的是：一个人要在这个世界上生存，就需要盟友。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Krond's second set of Specializations by $amount%

description.original: My mother's influence will never leave me.
description.display: 我母亲的影响永远伴随着我。

description.original: Hatred clouded my mind and guided my hands for too long. Now I choose a better path.
description.display: 我的心智和行动受仇恨蒙蔽太久了。现在我将选择一条更好的路。

effects.description: Sets Krond's alignment to Lawful Good and Unsung Alliance now stacks based on Good Champions instead of Evil

description.original: Whatever our cause, we fight for it together.
description.display: 不管我们的目标是什么，我们都会共同为之而战。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Krond's Unsung Alliance ability by $amount%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Krond was born of a union between an academic human wizard and a mighty orc fighter who led a nomadic orc community. Raised as a fearsome warrior and arcane scholar, he studied these arts with equal passion. Krond's parents tragically lost their lives protecting their family and friends during an enemy raid. This moment changed Krond, and he swore revenge upon the world. Taking up an ancestral warhammer called Unity, Krond set out to make things right, one way or another.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Krond is a heavy damage dealer who can be customized through his specialization to excel in many different situations.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 克朗的母亲是一位学识渊博的人类法师，父亲则是一位曾统领游牧兽人部落的强悍兽人战士。自幼，他便被当作一名令人胆寒的战士与精通奥术的学者来培养，对战斗技艺与奥术学问抱有同等的热忱。在一次敌人的突袭中，他的父母为了保护家人和朋友不幸丧生。这一悲惨瞬间彻底改变了他的人生轨迹，他发誓要向这个世界复仇。随后，他拿起一把名为“团结”的祖传战锤，决心用尽一切办法，向世界讨回一个公道。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 克朗是重型伤害输出者，可以通过自定义专精适应众多不同情况。

effects.description: 使克朗的第二组专精的效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Redemption Arc
original.description: Hatred clouded my mind and guided my hands for too long. Now I choose a better path.

effects.description: Sets Krond's alignment to Lawful Good and Unsung Alliance now stacks based on Good Champions instead of Evil

display.name: 救赎之路
display.description: 我的心智和行动受仇恨蒙蔽太久了。现在我将选择一条更好的路。

effects.description: 将克朗的阵营设定为守序善良，且“无名联盟”现在基于善良勇士进行叠加，而非邪恶勇士。

original.name: Cantrip: Heightened Thunderclap
original.description: I was inspired to study how a dao genie's magic can burst apart the very earth.

effects.description: Krond's base attack deals $amount% of its damage as area damage to all nearby enemies.

display.name: 戏法：强化雷鸣术
display.description: 我受到启发，研究了道魔精灵的魔法如何能炸开大地。

effects.description: 克朗的基本攻击对附近所有敌人造成其伤害 $amount% 的范围伤害。

original.name: Cantrip: Heightened Shocking Grasp
original.description: I trained with storm giants in a castle above the clouds to learn the secrets of their mighty thunderbolts.

effects.description: Krond gains the Control role and his base attack deals additional $amount% damage to the main target, and the target is stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

display.name: 戏法：强化电爪术
display.description: 我在云层之上的城堡中与风暴巨人一起训练，学习他们强大的雷电奥秘。

effects.description: 克朗获得“控制”角色定位，他的基本攻击对主要目标额外造成 $amount% 的伤害，且目标会被眩晕 $stun_duration 秒。

original.name: Cantrip: Heightened Fire Bolt
original.description: I sparred for a tenday with a salamander inferno master. Let me show you what I learned.

effects.description: Krond's base attacks shoot out $num_projectiles fire bolts, each dealing $amount% of its base damage to up to four other random enemies.

display.name: 戏法：强化火焰箭
display.description: 我与一名火蜥蜴炼狱大师切磋了十天。给你展示一下我学到的东西吧。

effects.description: 克朗的基本攻击射出 $num_projectiles 支火焰箭，每支箭对最多四个其他随机敌人造成其基础伤害 $amount% 的伤害。

original.name: Cantrip: Ascendant Thunderclap
original.description: I survived the thunderous bellow of the legendary tarrasque. Now I wield that ruin for my own.

effects.description: Krond's base attack deals $amount% of its damage as area damage to all nearby enemies.

display.name: 戏法：升华雷鸣术
display.description: 我从传说中泰拉斯奎巨兽那雷鸣般的咆哮中幸存下来。现在我将那毁灭之力为己所用。

effects.description: 克朗的基本攻击对附近所有敌人造成其伤害 $amount% 的范围伤害。

original.name: Cantrip: Ascendant Shocking Grasp
original.description: Few can survive the lightning strike of a rampaging kraken. I did. Let's see how you fare.

effects.description: Krond gains the Control role and his base attack deals additional $amount% damage to the main target, and the target is stunned for $stun_duration seconds.

display.name: 戏法：升华电爪术
display.description: 很少有人能在横冲直撞的海怪的闪电攻击下幸存。我做到了。来看看你能撑多久。

effects.description: 克朗获得“控制”角色定位，他的基本攻击对主要目标额外造成 $amount% 的伤害，且目标会被眩晕 $stun_duration 秒。

original.name: Cantrip: Ascendant Fire Bolt
original.description: An ancient red dragon was among my finest masters. I slew her and took her flame for my own.

effects.description: Krond's base attacks shoot out $num_projectiles fire bolts, each dealing $amount% of its base damage to up to five other random enemies.

display.name: 戏法：升华火焰箭
display.description: 一位古老的红龙曾是我最出色的导师之一。我杀了她，并将她的火焰据为己有。

effects.description: 克朗的基本攻击射出 $num_projectiles 支火焰箭，每支箭对最多五个其他随机敌人造成其基础伤害 $amount% 的伤害。

original.name: Kindred Spirits
original.description: Whatever our cause, we fight for it together.

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Krond's Unsung Alliance ability by $amount%

display.name: 家族精神
display.description: 不管我们的目标是什么，我们都会共同为之而战。

effects.description: 使克朗“无名联盟”技能的基础效果提升 $amount%
